caption: A person holds a sports card in a clear protective case, rotating it to show different sides. In the background, a man wearing a navy blue t-shirt sits at a desk with computer monitors and peripherals. On-screen text overlays include the logo "JASPYS" followed by a red heart and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the person turns the card, the back is initially visible, followed by a side view. Eventually, the front of the card is revealed, showing a baseball player in a navy blue and orange Houston Astros jersey. The player's name, "NOLAN RYAN", is printed at the top of the card. The card features a signature and the word "ASTROS" in large letters at the bottom. The person's hands are visible throughout, manipulating the encased card over a colorful patterned surface featuring palm tree designs.
